title: Service of petition; parent; child
doc_html:
Art. 1019.2. Service of petition; parent; child

            A copy of the petition and the notice of the nature of the hearing and the rights of the parent, as provided for in Article 1020, shall be served, in a sealed envelope, upon every parent of the child. A copy of the petition and the notice of the nature of the hearing shall be served on the child through the entity designated for the jurisdiction to provide counsel for the child.

            Acts 2022, No. 272, §1.

Art. 1019.2.  Service of petition; parent; child
A copy of the petition and the notice of the nature of the hearing and the rights of the
parent, as provided for in Article 1020, shall be served, in a sealed envelope, upon every
parent of the child.  A copy of the petition and the notice of the nature of the hearing shall
be served on the child through the entity designated for the jurisdiction to provide counsel
for the child.
Acts 2022, No. 272, §1.
